requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — NFPA 855-Aligned Design Requirements for Grenada; Hurricane-Hardened and Salt-Mist-Resistant Enclosure Standards
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——格林纳达NFPA 855对应设计要求；飓风加固及防盐雾外壳标准
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——格瑞那達NFPA 855對應設計要求；颶風加固及防鹽霧外殼標準

summary.en: Grenada follows an IEC/UK-legacy and NFPA-informed fire-safety code framework, consistent with other Eastern Caribbean OECS member states. The Royal Grenada Police Force (RGPF) Fire Department has responsibility for fire safety enforcement and building fire-safety approvals in Grenada. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code and is expected to be the applicable reference for BESS project design in Grenada given the NFPA code framework adopted across the Caribbean region. Formal confirmation of NFPA 855 adoption specifically for stationary BESS in Grenada had not been obtained from a publicly accessible official source as of the dataset date; direct verification with the RGPF Fire Department and the Ministry responsible for building codes is required before project design is finalised. Additionally, Grenada's geographic and climatic context imposes hardware design requirements beyond standard fire safety: (1) Hurricane wind-load — post-Ivan (2004) reconstruction standards require structural integrity for Category 4–5 hurricane conditions; BESS container and enclosure design should demonstrate compliance with applicable Caribbean wind-load standards (e.g. OECS/Caribbean Uniform Building Code wind-load provisions); (2) Salt-mist corrosion derating — Grenada's tropical marine environment requires IEC 60068-2-52 (Climatic Testing — Salt Mist, Cyclic) corrosion resistance certification for outdoor or coastal BESS installations; IP54 minimum enclosure ingress protection rating and C4 or C5 anticorrosion coating classification are practical expectations for Caribbean coastal sites.
summary.zh: 格林纳达遵循与其他东加勒比OECS成员国一致的IEC/英国传统和NFPA参考消防安全规范框架。格林纳达皇家警察部队（RGPF）消防部门负责格林纳达的消防安全执法和建筑消防安全审批。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装规范，鉴于加勒比海地区采用NFPA规范框架，预计是格林纳达BESS项目设计的适用参考。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源获得格林纳达专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855的确认；须在项目设计最终确定前直接向RGPF消防部门及主管建筑规范的部委核实。此外，格林纳达的地理和气候背景对硬件设计提出了超越标准消防安全的要求：（1）飓风风荷载——2004年伊万飓风后的重建标准要求结构完整性达到四至五级飓风条件；BESS集装箱和外壳设计应证明符合适用的加勒比海风荷载标准（如OECS/加勒比海统一建筑规范风荷载条款）；（2）盐雾腐蚀降额——格林纳达的热带海洋环境要求室外或沿海BESS装置的IEC 60068-2-52（气候测试——盐雾循环）腐蚀防护认证；加勒比海沿海场址的实际预期为最低IP54外壳防护等级及C4或C5防腐涂层等级。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達遵循與其他東加勒比OECS成員國一致的IEC/英國傳統和NFPA參考消防安全規範框架。格瑞那達皇家警察部隊（RGPF）消防部門負責格瑞那達的消防安全執法和建築消防安全審批。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝規範，鑑於加勒比海地區採用NFPA規範框架，預計是格瑞那達BESS項目設計的適用參考。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源獲得格瑞那達專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855的確認；須在項目設計最終確定前直接向RGPF消防部門及主管建築規範的部委核實。此外，格瑞那達的地理和氣候背景對硬件設計提出了超越標準消防安全的要求：（1）颶風風荷載——2004年伊萬颶風後的重建標準要求結構完整性達到四至五級颶風條件；BESS集裝箱和外殼設計應證明符合適用的加勒比海風荷載標準（如OECS/加勒比海統一建築規範風荷載條款）；（2）鹽霧腐蝕降額——格瑞那達的熱帶海洋環境要求室外或沿海BESS裝置的IEC 60068-2-52（氣候測試——鹽霧循環）腐蝕防護認證；加勒比海沿海場址的實際預期為最低IP54外殼防護等級及C4或C5防腐塗層等級。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (expected fire-installation reference for BESS in Grenada given Caribbean NFPA code framework; formal Grenada adoption specifically for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with RGPF Fire Department)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (fire suppression reference in Caribbean NFPA framework)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (fire alarm reference in Caribbean NFPA framework)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Salt Mist, Cyclic (corrosion resistance requirement for tropical marine deployments)
OECS/Caribbean Uniform Building Code (CUBIC) — wind-load provisions applicable post-Ivan reconstruction for structural design of BESS enclosures and containers

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. GB/T 36276-2023 includes module and cluster fire-safety design guidance. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law. China's fire-safety standards do not address Caribbean hurricane wind-load or tropical marine salt-mist requirements; Chinese manufacturers producing BESS for Caribbean markets must separately certify enclosures and structural mounts for hurricane wind-load and IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist conditions. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised as equivalent to Grenada's NFPA-based fire-safety installation requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。GB/T 36276-2023包含模组和电池簇消防安全设计指引。中国的项目级消防审查由《消防法》下地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。中国消防安全标准未涵盖加勒比海飓风风荷载或热带海洋盐雾要求；面向加勒比海市场生产BESS的中国制造商须另行取得外壳和结构支架的飓风风荷载及IEC 60068-2-52盐雾条件认证。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被认可为等同于格林纳达基于NFPA的消防安全安装要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。GB/T 36276-2023包含模組和電池簇消防安全設計指引。中國的項目級消防審查由《消防法》下地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。中國消防安全標準未涵蓋加勒比海颶風風荷載或熱帶海洋鹽霧要求；面向加勒比海市場生產BESS的中國製造商須另行取得外殼和結構支架的颶風風荷載及IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧條件認證。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被認可為等同於格瑞那達基於NFPA的消防安全安裝要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; covers system-level fire safety)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; includes module/cluster fire-safety design guidance)

gap.en: Gap: Fire-safety installation approval from the RGPF Fire Department is a mandatory project gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Grenada. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Grenada's NFPA-based requirements. Beyond standard fire-safety compliance, Grenada imposes additional environmental design requirements not addressed in Chinese standards. Exporters and project teams should: (a) verify directly with the RGPF Fire Department whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the applicable standard for BESS installations and determine any Grenada-specific requirements or derogations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression equipment is certified by an internationally recognised laboratory (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, or SGS) where required; (d) certify BESS enclosures and structural mounting systems for Category 4–5 hurricane wind-load per applicable Caribbean building code wind provisions; (e) obtain IEC 60068-2-52 (salt mist, cyclic) corrosion resistance evidence for BESS enclosures deployed in Grenada's tropical marine coastal environment; IP54 minimum and C4/C5 anticorrosion coating are recommended starting points; (f) engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer familiar with Caribbean NFPA code application for design review and authority submission.
gap.zh: 差距：RGPF消防部门的消防安全安装审批是格林纳达所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足格林纳达基于NFPA的要求。除标准消防合规外，格林纳达还提出中国标准未涵盖的额外环境设计要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向RGPF消防部门确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为BESS安装的适用标准，并确定任何格林纳达专项要求或豁免；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防抑制设备在需要时经国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV或SGS）认证；（d）按照适用的加勒比海建筑规范风荷载条款，为BESS外壳和结构支架取得四至五级飓风风荷载认证；（e）取得在格林纳达热带海洋沿海环境部署的BESS外壳的IEC 60068-2-52（盐雾循环）腐蚀防护证据；建议起点为最低IP54和C4/C5防腐涂层；（f）聘请熟悉加勒比海NFPA规范应用的本地持牌消防工程师进行设计审查和主管机关提交。
gap.zht: 差距：RGPF消防部門的消防安全安裝審批是格瑞那達所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足格瑞那達基於NFPA的要求。除標準消防合規外，格瑞那達還提出中國標準未涵蓋的額外環境設計要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向RGPF消防部門確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為BESS安裝的適用標準，並確定任何格瑞那達專項要求或豁免；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防抑制設備在需要時經國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV或SGS）認證；（d）按照適用的加勒比海建築規範風荷載條款，為BESS外殼和結構支架取得四至五級颶風風荷載認證；（e）取得在格瑞那達熱帶海洋沿海環境部署的BESS外殼的IEC 60068-2-52（鹽霧循環）腐蝕防護證據；建議起點為最低IP54和C4/C5防腐塗層；（f）聘請熟悉加勒比海NFPA規範應用的本地持牌消防工程師進行設計審查和主管機關提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RGPF Fire Department approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Grenada; NFPA 855 adoption specifically for BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with RGPF Fire Department; hurricane wind-load and salt-mist certification are practical project requirements for Caribbean deployment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; no equivalent hurricane or tropical marine corrosion requirement exists in Chinese domestic BESS standards

source.publisher: Government of Grenada — Ministry responsible for fire safety and building codes (RGPF Fire Department)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RGPF Fire Department fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Grenada. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Grenada's NFPA-based requirements. Additionally, Grenada's tropical Caribbean environment imposes hurricane wind-load (post-Ivan 2004, Category 4–5 design basis) and IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist corrosion resistance requirements that are absent from Chinese domestic BESS standards and must be separately addressed. Engage the RGPF Fire Department and a locally licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code, NFPA 855 adoption status, and all design requirements — including enclosure hardening and corrosion protection — before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RGPF消防部门消防安全审批是格林纳达商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足格林纳达基于NFPA的要求。此外，格林纳达的热带加勒比海环境提出了中国国内BESS标准中缺失的飓风风荷载（2004年伊万飓风后四至五级设计标准）和IEC 60068-2-52盐雾腐蚀要求，须另行解决。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与RGPF消防部门及本地持牌消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范、NFPA 855采纳状态及所有设计要求——包括外壳加固和防腐保护。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RGPF消防部門消防安全審批是格瑞那達商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足格瑞那達基於NFPA的要求。此外，格瑞那達的熱帶加勒比海環境提出了中國國內BESS標準中缺失的颶風風荷載（2004年伊萬颶風後四至五級設計標準）和IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧腐蝕要求，須另行解決。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與RGPF消防部門及本地持牌消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範、NFPA 855採納狀態及所有設計要求——包括外殼加固和防腐保護。
